label: 第240話
source_locator: 単行本27巻 目次 p.66
summary_short: 宿儺への総攻撃前、高専側は羂索を髙羽に任せる作戦を立てていた。羂索は髙羽の術式を攻略するため、彼の笑いと自信を折ろうとする。
summary_full: 宿儺への総攻撃前、高専側は羂索を髙羽に任せる作戦を立てていた。羂索は髙羽の術式を攻略するため、彼の笑いと自信を折ろうとする。作戦会議では髙羽の術式を本人へ明かさず、乙骨が止めを刺す配置が決められていた。羂索は髙羽の笑いへの自信を折ることが攻略法だと判断する。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: It was decided before the raid on 宿儺 began that 高羽史彦 would be the one to attack 羂索 . However, not even 高羽 expected his opponent to openly engage in a clash of wits and comedy.
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: The jujutsu sorcerers discuss their plans for 羂索. Before the battle of the strongest , the 天使 discussed ambushing 羂索 with the 呪術高専 sorcerers . She pointed out that defeating 宿儺 would be pointless if 羂索 achieved his goal of merging the people of Japan with 天元 . 秤金次 noted that judging from the latest rules added by 羂索, killing all the 死滅回游 players is likely the condition to end the event. 乙骨憂太 questioned why they should worry about the conditions when he and 秤 are also players. As long as they're alive and fighting 宿儺, 羂索 can't end the 死滅回游. 日下部 mentally countered 憂太's statement by thinking about the possibility that defeating 宿儺 can come at the cost of all their players' lives. He also considered players like 三輪霞 who couldn't participate in the raid but chose not to verbalize his thoughts so as not to bring down the mood. 天使 suggested the possibility of 羂索 ambushing them if 五条 lost, which 秤 admitted would be disadvantageous for them if they were occupied with fighting 宿儺. 天使 added that even if 羂索 didn't ambush them and they achieved a narrow victory against 宿儺 at the cost of 五条, they would be too weakened to fight 羂索. 日下部 recommended 禪院真希 attack 羂索 but added that it would be unwise to divide their forces before fighting 宿儺. Additionally, the fighter they chose would have to be more competent than a grade 1 jujutsu sorcerer to be up to the task. 冥冥 joked that 日下部 was incompetent since he was a grade 1 sorcerer, much to his annoyance, though she also considered herself unqualified due to having a record of running away from 羂索 in 渋谷 . 天使 nominated 高羽史彦 , much to 憂太, 秤, and 日下部's confusion. 天使 then asked the sorcerers present to keep quiet about the information she was about to reveal since it could negatively affect 高羽's 術式 . She proceeded to explain 高羽's abilities and why he was the perfect candidate. 高羽 unaffected by 羂索's 呪霊. In the present, 羂索 struggles to deal damage to 高羽 using his 呪霊 . As 高羽 manifests an American flag bandanna and a pair of sunglasses on 羂索, the ancient sorcerer concludes that 高羽's 術式 is the ability to manifest phenomena, which allows 高羽 to create and control things he imagines. 羂索 fears knowledge of jujutsu gained across a thousand years is useless if he's not careful. 羂索 finds 高羽 troublesome but remains determined to find a weakness, asking 高羽 to identify himself. 高羽 introduces himself as a comedian of Nabe Nabe who made it into the first round of P-1 last year, a tournament to determine the best stand-up comedian in Japan. 羂索 asks if the P-1 he is speaking of is the tournament notorious for only being funny due to how bad the performances are, much to 高羽's anger. 羂索 says he was joking and tells 高羽 that he's already predicted his punch lines to his statement about P-1, further annoying the comedian. 羂索 then says that he expected 高羽 to be affiliated with Pony instead of Nabe Nabe. 高羽 replies that while everyone assumes that about him, the reason he chose Nabe Nabe is because of a certain comedian he admired due to watching Laughing Dog growing up. As 羂索 is surprised that 高羽 didn't watch VOCABULA, the comedian realizes that 羂索 can understand him and wonders if he also likes comedy. 羂索 counters 高羽's technique using his knowledge of comedy. 高羽 then asks 羂索 why he is making people kill each other and trying to merge them to create a monster. Tired of having to repeat himself on this topic, 羂索 quickly summarizes his motivation as intellectual curiosity. 高羽 then asks if 羂索 would give up his plans if he found something more interesting, which the ancient sorcerer posits that he may. 高羽 then points out that 羂索 has "make me laugh" written all over his face, much to 羂索's chagrin when he realizes the idiom was literal using a mirror. 高羽 prepares to deliver a one-liner, piquing 羂索's curiosity. 高羽 then says "Don't marry me! I don't want you as my wi-fi!", but it fails to make 羂索 laugh. 羂索 accurately guesses that 高羽 thought up the joke when his phone automatically connected to a café's slow wi-fi. He adds that the joke would not work well for an audience watching from their TV at home. 羂索 then further criticizes 高羽's joke for having no setup. Dismayed, 高羽 remembers someone saying "Doing comedy with you is not fun!!". 羂索 advises him to craft his jokes with an audience in mind. Why did I ever become an entertainer?" 羂索 finishes his criticism and elbow-strikes 高羽 in the abdomen, sending the comedian crashing into the forest. 羂索 notes that he felt his attack land this time, concluding that confidence and certainty are necessary for 高羽's technique. As 羂索 pursues 高羽, the latter dismisses his criticism earlier by calling 羂索 a poseur who's never been on stage. He claims that he doesn't care if 羂索 doesn't laugh at his jokes as long as everyone else does. 羂索 then questions if 高羽 could confidently say that himself, stunning the comedian. Frustrated, 高羽 demands to have a staring contest with 羂索 where whoever laughs first loses. The two sorcerers then make funny faces at the same time with 高羽 laughing first, allowing 羂索 to land a powerful right punch on his face that sends him flying. Laying on the ground, 高羽 begins to wonder if 羂索 is funnier than him and begins to lose confidence in himself. Remembering his colleague's words, he tries to regain confidence and collect himself, only to see 庵 黄櫨折 's corpse as he looks up. The scene horrifies 高羽, and as 羂索 approaches from behind, the comedian realizes that the situation isn't funny and begins to remember why he wanted to become an entertainer.
candidate_evidence.characters_raw_text: 来栖華 天使 乙骨憂太 日下部篤也 冥冥 秤金次 宿儺 (言及のみ) 五条悟 (言及のみ) 羂索 高羽史彦 庵 黄櫨折
candidate_evidence.battles_events_raw_text: 高羽史彦 vs. 羂索
candidate_evidence.techniques_raw_text: 高羽史彦の術式 超人 羂索の術式 呪霊操術

key_events_verified_phase11: 宿儺への総攻撃前、高専側は羂索を髙羽に任せる作戦を立てていた。
羂索は髙羽の術式を攻略するため、彼の笑いと自信を折ろうとする。
作戦会議では髙羽の術式を本人へ明かさず、乙骨が止めを刺す配置が決められていた。
羂索は髙羽の笑いへの自信を折ることが攻略法だと判断する。
verification_notes_phase11: 集英社公式24～30巻目次・巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別資料、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した最終区間。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
